PLAINTIFF ALMA VIGIL'S MOTION FOR ORDER REMOVING CASE FROM ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: MEDIATION ON 7/28/2010 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL DATE OF 10/12/2010 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Alma Vigil's Motion for Order removing case from Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Mediation on 7/28/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 10/12/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings not reported. (212)
